name: Immunofluorescence Staining for Cryostat Sections
nameCn: 冰冻切片免疫荧光染色方案

usage.en: Immunofluorescence staining protocol for cryostat-sectioned frozen tissue with saponin-based permeabilization.
usage.zh: 冰冻切片免疫荧光染色方案，使用皂苷通透。

materials.name: Blocking buffer: PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum

components.name: Step 1: Fix tissue sections with 3.2% PFA (prewarmed at 37°C) for 15 min.
Step 2: Rinse 3× with PBS, 5 min each.
Step 3: Block for 30 min with blocking buffer (PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum).
Step 4: Prepare primary antibody in blocking buffer.

note.en: Typical: 1:200. Some antibodies (e.g. Ly6G 2 mg/mL): 1:800. Titrate if high background.
note.zh: 通常 1:200。某些抗体（如 Ly6G 2 mg/mL）：1:800。背景高则滴定优化。

components.name: Step 5: Incubate primary antibody overnight at 4°C.
Step 6: Wash 3× with PBS, 5 min each.
Step 7: Prepare secondary antibody (1:500 typical) in blocking buffer with DAPI (1:1000). Incubate 1 h at RT.

note.en: Some antibodies may need higher dilution to reduce background.
note.zh: 某些二抗可能需更高稀释倍数减少背景。

components.name: Step 9: Mount in anti-fade mounting buffer. Seal with nail polish. Dry overnight at RT.
Step 10: Image on fluorescence microscope, or store at -20°C for later use.

notes.en: Saponin-based blocking buffer is suitable for intracellular targets. For membrane-only targets, 0.1% Triton X-100 can substitute for saponin. Keep sections moist throughout — never let them dry. Use a humid dark box during antibody incubations.
notes.zh: 皂苷通透适合细胞内靶标。仅膜靶标可用 0.1% Triton X-100 替代皂苷。全程保持切片湿润——切勿干燥。抗体孵育时使用避光湿盒。

ref: Adapted from standard cryostat immunofluorescence protocol (2021)
